class ahb_env extends uvm_env;
  `uvm_component_utils(ahb_env)
  ahb_agent agent;
  ahb_scoreboard scb;
  ahb_cov cov;
  function new(string name, uvm_component parent); super.new(name, parent); endfunction
  function void build_phase(uvm_phase phase);
    agent = ahb_agent::type_id::create("agent", this);
    scb = ahb_scoreboard::type_id::create("scb", this);
    cov=ahb_cov::type_id::create("cov",this);
  endfunction
  function void connect_phase(uvm_phase phase);
    agent.agent_ap.connect(scb.item_collected_export);
    agent.agent_ap.connect(cov.analysis_export);
  endfunction
endclass
